title: pavonia paneroi
intro: Pavonia paneroi, also known as the Mexican Rose Mallow, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Pavonia paneroi include reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in topical applications to promote healing and skin regeneration.
